name: Quick Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to your bread machine in the order specified by the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Mix until a dough forms.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan.
4. Cover and allow it to rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
